default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New destination pages (e.g., Marietta's Islands) are being created with high-quality visuals and content](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [SEO performance saw a slight decline in impressions/clicks, but within normal volatility](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Technical issues with Sanity CMS are impacting content publishing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Content review process needs refinement to avoid mentioning competitors and ensure image diversity](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

## Topics

### New Destination Pages Development

  - [Marietta's Islands page nearly complete, praised for its visuals](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Next destinations: Yelapa and Caletas (videos ready)](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Strategy: Reproduce format across destinations (Vallarta, Cabo, Cancun)](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Header videos crucial; only Sayulita's pending](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Plan to interlink new pages with high-performing content (e.g., "cities to visit vacation destinations in Mexico")](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Slight decline in impressions and clicks past week](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Possible factors: competition, seasonality, volatility](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Vallarta showing steady performance due to recent article launches](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Cancun's performance heavily influenced by popular Sargassum article](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Publishing Challenges

  - [Sanity CMS issue: links not preserved when pasting content](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Potential solution: enable custom paste rules (requires developer intervention)](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Time-consuming process of manually re-adding links post-paste](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Need for Lucero to review articles before publication](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Issues found: mentioning competitors (e.g., Rio Secreto) unknowingly](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Aim: Maintain image diversity, avoid repetition in thumbnails](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Schema plugin v1 published by Oscar](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Carlos testing and implementing schema markup, starting with homepage](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Instagram embeds may slow page load; suggestion to limit to 1-2 per article](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [New feature: Instagram feed can be added to Enriched Text for blogs (in beta)](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Tour Updates

  - [Cancun: Adventure tours reopened (2 out of 4 original tours)](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Food tours category removed; Taco Tour moved to "Bucket List" category](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Isla Mujeres: Two tour options available, including private vessel rentals](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Isabel to continue developing destination pages, starting with Yelapa or Caletas for Vallarta](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Angelica to begin with Isla Mujeres page for Cancun](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
  - [Mariana to await Lucero's review before publishing articles](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Carlos to complete schema markup implementation, starting with homepage](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Saul to investigate Sanity CMS paste issue and potential solutions](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=364.0)
  - [Team to be mindful of Instagram embed usage to maintain page load speed](https://fathom.video/share/FJox1_Jrsrqa52xkAEDDsQ7UCYXJefVX?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)

action_items.description: Start work on Yelapa or Caletas destination page for Vallarta
Report HTML pasting issue in Sanity to VogueHard. Open new ticket
Coordinate w/ Lucero for article review before publication
Complete schema markup for homepage. Test & apply to blogs if successful
Investigate ways to improve Instagram embed loading efficiency
Begin work on Isla Mujeres destination page for Cancun
